twitter_thread: 12% of AI security platforms can handle Rag Security. The other 88% are exposed to attacks like the one that breached 300k records last month.
Prompt Injection attacks on Rag Security vulnerabilities can inject malicious code in <100 characters, making them hard to detect.
LLMVault's intentionally vulnerable platform can help test Rag Security defenses, with 25+ scenarios to simulate real-world attacks.
Generic prompts won't cut it: 4 out of 5 Rag Security tests fail to detect breaches due to poorly designed test cases.
Targeted prompts, like those simulating SQL injection or cross-site scripting, can detect 95% of Rag Security vulnerabilities.
Implementing Rag Security measures can reduce AI system breach risk by 70%, from $1.1m to $330k per incident.
How do you prioritize Rag Security in your AI system's defense strategy? #aitech #security
